description_long: This is a two-story house with a light blue gable roof and white exterior walls, set on a square stone-tiled lot bordered by a low curb. The front features an open porch with a small table and chairs, a potted tree, and a staircase leading to the upper floor, which has a balcony and visible bedroom furnishings. The house has multiple windows with blue trim, including arched and rectangular shapes, and a heart-shaped cutout on the main door. The rear and one side of the house are mostly solid walls, while the other side has a balcony and open stair access. The landscaping includes a circular planter for the tree and a small fenced garden area. The overall design is charming and whimsical, with pastel colors and playful architectural details.
description: A whimsical two-story house with a blue gable roof, open porch, balcony, and playful pastel accents, set on a stone-tiled lot with a potted tree and garden.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open porch, outdoor furniture, staircase to the upper floor, balcony, and main entry door with a heart cutout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solid wall, upper balcony railing, and the potted tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the balcony extending from the upper floor.
description_view_3: Right side view features vertically stacked arched windows, the main entry door, and the small fenced garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a heart-shaped cutout door, small porch with steps, decorative railing, and adjacent garden fence.
